arrival.text: When you arrive at this location, pull up to the valet at the front of the hotel and present your SpotHero reservation. They will give you a ticket and park your car. You MUST have this ticket when you arrive back to retrieve your vehicle.
Proceed to airport check-in, which is a short 5-minute walk from the hotel.

departure.text: Upon your arrival back to the airport, collect your baggage and return to the hotel.
Present your valet ticket to the attendant, who will retrieve your vehicle.
Simply leave when you are ready to go!

common.title: The Westin Denver International Airport - Covered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Arrive at 8300 Pena Blvd. This is the valet for The Westin Denver International Airport and is operated by Propark. The entrance is next to the transit center and Bags Inc. Follow the blue signs for The Westin along Pena Blvd.
restrictions: EV charging is available for an additional $35 paid directly to the facility.
Height restriction: 6' 4"
If you are planning on parking a vehicle that takes up more than one parking space, you will be required to pay for that additional space on-site. If you have any questions, please call the hotel.
If you are planning to park a large SUV, please call ahead to the location at (720)-965-2151 to ensure they can accommodate your vehicle
The Westin Denver valet is connected to the airport. Check-in is a 5-minute walk from valet.

The Westin Hotel valet parking is located on the West terminal side of Denver International Airport. Valet operations are open 24 hours a day and are conveniently located next to the transit center and Bags INC on the ground level of the hotel.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

arrival.text: Please do not swipe a credit card to enter the facility, instead please scan your reservation. Scan the QR code located on the SpotHero parking pass.

Follow the signs to the Uncovered Self-Parking area. The shuttle will pick you up at your vehicle. Shuttle runs 24/7

There are no in-and-out privileges. Every time you enter the facility you will start a new stay. If you have any questions, please hit the Help button and Call Support on the kiosk touch screen for assistance.

departure.text: Upon your return, please text "shuttle" at 303-342-0500 for airport pickup. Shuttle runs 24/7.

On exit, scan your reservation again and follow the on-screen instructions. If you have stayed past your reservation end date/time, you will be required to pay the additional balance during check out at the posted rate(s) listed at the lot.

There are no in-and-out privileges. Every time you enter the facility you will start a new stay. If you have any questions, please hit the Help button and Call Support on the kiosk touch screen for assistance.

common.title: WallyPark DEN - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 24200 E 78th St. This is the WallyPark DEN lot. From Pena Blvd. exit onto 75th Ave. and turn left on N Gun Club Rd. Proceed to 75th Ave. and turn right. The entrance will be approximately a quarter mile on the right, located between Enterprise and Budget Car Rentals. Look for the driveway that has a big, red and white signpost that reads "WallyPark Airport Parking" next to three white attendant booths.
restrictions: Shuttle Notice: Please allow up to 30 minutes for shuttle pickup and drop-off. Plan accordingly when traveling to the airport.

arrival.text: Scan your QR code at the outdoor lane. This is at the far right side of the entrance.
Proceed to outdoor parking.
Board the shuttle. Arrive curbside at Denver International Airport!
For Shuttle Pickup, please proceed outdoor 507 (East) or 510 (West) on level 5 and wait on Island 3 near the Fine Loading area signs. 303-340-3463.

departure.text: When exiting, scan your QR code again at the gate machine at the exit lanes under the scanner (marked in yellow)
Your are Free to go.

common.title: FINE Airport Parking DEN - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 5950 N Jackson Gap Way. This is the FINE Airport Parking outdoor self-park. It is located on the east side of Jackson Gap St. between E 56th Ave. and E 64th Ave.
restrictions: Location Amenities: Family Owned & Operated, Angled Wider Parking spots, 40 electric vehicle charging stations, High-End Detail Shop, Free Gourmet Coffee and Hot Chocolate, Free Popcorn, Free Bottled Water, Free Roses, and more.
Prompt shuttle service to the airport terminal. Estimated shuttle ride is 8 minutes.

arrival.text: When you arrive to the facility entrance, scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
Please park anywhere that is uncovered. Follow the signs for 'Fastest Shuttle Loading Row' and turn your vehicle flashers on. The shuttle will come to pick you up and assist you with your luggage.

departure.text: When you arrive back at the airport, you'll find the shuttle on either side of the terminal on Ground Transportation Level 5 - Island 3. On the west side exit through door 504 and proceed to Island 3. On the east side exit through door 513 and proceed to Island 3.
When you are ready to go, proceed to the exit and scan your SpotHero parking pass and the gate will open.

restrictions: Please note: this rate cannot be combined with any other offer, discount, or membership.

arrival.text: When you arrive at the hotel, note your license plate information, and proceed to the front desk. Show the hotel front desk your parking reservation, receive a validation code, and register your vehicle via the QR code at the front desk. QR code registration includes license plate information, phone number, duration of stay, and validation code.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pickup area. Shuttle Hours: 3:30 am– 11:30 pm: departs every 30 minutes. 11:30 pm–1:30 am: departs every hour.

departure.text: The shuttle departs from the West Terminal outside of door #512 on Island #3. Simply contact us at (303) 628-7777 to request the shuttle or obtain additional information. Shuttle Hours: 3:30 am– 11:30 pm: departs every 30 minutes. 11:30 pm–1:30 am: departs every hour.
Simply leave when you're ready to go

common.title: Hyatt House Denver Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 18741 E 71st Ave. This is the Hyatt House Denver Airport lot, operated by PMC. It is located on the North side of E 71st Ave. between Argonne St. and Tower Rd.
restrictions:
Shuttle Schedule: 

Hotel Departures - 

Every 30 minutes from 3:30 AM to 11:30 pm and hourly from 11:30 pm to 1:30 AM.

Airport Pickups - 

At :15 and :45 minutes past every hour.

To schedule your shuttle ride, call the hotel at (303) 628-7777. You may reserve your seat up to 24 hours in advance. All shuttle requests must be made at least 30 minutes before your desired departure time. Reservations are required to guarantee your spot. Seating is not assigned and is on a first-come, first-served basis.

When arriving back at DEN, collect your belongings, head to the shuttle pick-up area, and call the hotel to arrange for pickup: 303-647-5939 ext.3
Hotel shuttles pick-up from Jeppesen Terminal Level 5, island 3, 510-512 (west side).
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: DoubleTree Denver Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: This Lot is located in the alley adjacent to 6900 Tower Rd. From the intersection of 70th Ave. and Argonne St., head South on Argonne St. towards E 68th Ave. Turn right to enter the alley at 6997 Argonne St. Head West through the alley until you reach the Lot adjacent to 6900 Tower Rd.
restrictions: Shuttles run on a rotating schedule and pickup may take up to 30 minutes. We recommend allowing extra time for airport travel.
You may be asked to show your parking pass to the shuttle drive,  please have it available on your phone or printed.

When you arrive at this location, you may park anywhere not marked as "Reserved".
Gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pickup area. The shuttle runs on demand 24/7, approximately every 30 minutes if the ride is scheduled.

common.title: Staybridge Suites Denver International Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 6951 Tower Rd. This is the Staybridge Suites Denver International Airport lot, operated by PMC. It is located on the West side of Tower Rd. between E 71st Ave. and 69th Ave. You can only access this location by traveling South on Tower Rd.
restrictions: Please call the hotel at (303) 574-0888 before you arrive to schedule your shuttle ride to DEN. There are only 14 seats available on the shuttle, and a failure to reserve a spot may result in not having a seat.

arrival.text: Scan your SpotHero QR code to enter this facility and proceed to the self-park area.
Once you have parked, proceed to the shuttle area.  The shuttle will take you to the Denver International Airport.

departure.text: Once your luggage is retrieved, proceed to the shuttle pickup area. The shuttle picks up from both sides of the terminal on Ground Transportation, Level 5 – Island 3, located on the westside. Exit through door 504 and proceed to Island 3, located on the eastside, exit through door 513 and proceed to Island 3.

The shuttle will pick you up and take you back to your vehicle.   
Please note: remember to have your parking location ready for the shuttle driver when you load.
Once you have returned to your vehicle, scan your parking pass, and the gate will open. You are free to go!

The shuttle picks up from both sides of the terminal on Ground Transportation, Level 5 – Island 3, located on the westside. Exit through door 504 and proceed to Island 3, located on the eastside, exit through door 513 and proceed to Island 3.

The shuttle will pick you up and take you back to your vehicle.   
Please note: remember to have your valet ticket ready for the shuttle driver when you load.
Once you have returned to your vehicle, scan your parking pass, and the gate will open. You are free to go!

The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

restrictions: Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

arrival.text: Show the valet your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
The valet will hand you a ticket, confirm how long you plan on parking, and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit.

Take the A Line Train from Union Station to Denver Airport Station. The A Line Train to the airport from Union Station is available every 15min 4am - 7pm and then every 30min from 7pm - 12:30am. The exact schedule can be found on the RTD website and tickets for the train can be purchased online or at Union Station.

departure.text: Take the A Line Train from Union Station to Denver Airport Station.
When you're ready to go, show the valet the ticket you received upon arrival and your SpotHero Parking Pass. The valet will scan your pass and your car will be retrieved.

restrictions: Height restriction: 7' 0"
